'''Scourge Squadron''' was an [[Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of the [[Pentastar Patrol]] under the [[Pentastar Alignment]]. It previously was part of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], where it was similar in composition and role to that of [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]].

==Description==
Scourge Squadron was a task force of 24 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] led by the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Reaper (Executor-class)|''Reaper'']].<ref name="TEGTW" />

==History==
As part of the [[Outer Rim Imperial Fleet]], Scourge Squadron came under the command of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]] when he was promoted to take over [[Oversector Outer]] as a replacement to Grand Moff [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]].<ref name="TEGTW" /> Scourge Squadron's primary mission was to hunt down [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TPA" />

Later on, when Grand Moff Kaine turned [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], he ordered Scourge Squadron to regroup in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] in open defiance against the Empire.<ref name="TEGTW" /> The fleet eventually served as the primary military muscle behind his [[Pentastar Alignment]].<ref name="TPA">{{JournalCite|3|The Pentastar Alignment}}</ref> The disappareance of Scourge Squadron in Oversector Outer contributed to the quick progression of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic fleet]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TEGTW" />
